title: Insertdead's QoL Mods
description: Enhancing the MC experience without straying from vanilla
body:
# Insertdead's QoL Mods
> A collection of mods I use a lot, packaged in a neat 'ol box.
> Probably won't be updated too often.

This modpack is intended to enhance Minecraft without modifying or adding to the core gameplay, and intends to be client-only (or only have client required) so you can play in all your favourite vanilla servers. Uses Quilt mod loader.

The most important mods are performance enhancement mods such as [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) and the [CaffeineMC](https://github.com/CaffeineMC) mod suite. However, other QoL mods have been included for further enhancement of the classic MC experience, such as [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) and [OkZoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)

## Mod List

### Performance enhancement
* Cull Leaves (Efficient leaves rendering)
* Enhanced Block Entities (More efficient block entity rendering)
* FerriteCore (Memory usage)
* LazyDFU (Decreased startup time)
* Lithium (General optimizations)
* Sodium (Fast rendering engine)
* Starlight (Light engine rewrite)

### QoL
* AppleSkin (Health & hunger HUD improvements)
* BetterF3 (Title self-explanatory)
* Blur (Adds a nice blur to menu backgrounds)
* Borderless Mining (Borderless-windowed instead of exclusive fullscreen)
* ClickThrough (Click through signs and item frames to chests)
* Continuity (Optifine CTM compatibility)
* Durability Viewer (View durability of items in HUD)
* Inspecio (Better tooltips)
* LambdaBetterGrass (Optifine-style grass)
* LambDynamicLights (Items can produce light too)
* Mod Menu (Title self-explanatory)
* Ok Zoomer (Zoom mod)
* Visuality (Enhanced particle effects)
* WTHIT (WAILA-style mod)

### Misc (Dependencies, Bug Fixes, etc.)
* bad packets (WTHIT dependency)
* Cloth Config API (General config dependency)
* Debugify (Fix variety of bugs)
* Indium (Allow custom FabricAPI models to render with Sodium)
* Quilted Fabric API / Quilt Standard Libraries (General dependency for Quilt and Fabric mods)
